title: Search for Missing Woman Takes Unexpected Turn with Discovery of Ancient Remains
description: The search for Nancy Guthrie, missing since February, took a surprising turn when a livestreamer discovered ancient remains near Tucson. Initially thought to be linked to her case, officials confirmed the remains are over 50 years old and unrelated. This revelation adds to the frustration surrounding the investigation, which has faced scrutiny for overlooked evidence and handling. With no new leads after extensive searches, the urgency to find Nancy continues as the investigation faces mounting challenges.

title: French toast isn’t actually French. How the ancient frugal meal got its contradictory name.
description: Many might assume that French toast is a French dish, but it actually dates back to ancient Rome and has gone by many different names.

title: Round-the-clock renewables: New report says clean energy now challenges fossil fuels on price
description: The cost of battery storage has dropped more than 90 per cent since 2010, bringing the cost of renewable energy down with it.

title: Gas prices nearing $5 highlight need to move away from fossil fuels
Lime tree to get the chop to improve view of ancient yew in churchyard
description: THE Consistory Court of the diocese of Oxford has granted a faculty permitting the felling of a healthy mature lime tree in the churchyard of St Mary the Virgin, Denham, in order to improve visibility of an ancient yew tree in the graveyard area o...
